title.en: Unexpectedly, Xuanqi Pavilion still has the hol...

content.en:
Whoa!!

The Great Ancestors of the Jiuyang Sea began to flee, and the Great Ancestors of Jiuyang were responsible for staying behind to stop the Xuanqi Armor.

If the Xuanqi armor slaughtered the other great ancestors, no one could resist it.

Since this place was in the Jiuyang Sea, it was easy for them to return to the headquarters, and they didn't lose too many Great Ancestors during the process.

In the blink of an eye, the Great Ancestors of Jiuyang Sea all returned to the headquarters of Jiuyang Sea, and opened a heavy magic array to resist the Great Ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion.

And the onlookers were completely dumbfounded, they didn't expect today's ending to be like this.

Prior to this, Xuanqi Pavilion's Xuanwu Mountain was captured by Jiuyang Sea, and Xuanxin Great Ancestor was killed, thinking that Xuanqi Pavilion was completely declining, and he was powerless to compete with Jiuyang Sea.

Unexpectedly, Xuanqi Pavilion still has the hole card of Xuanqi Jiashi!

After Jiuyanghai retreated to the headquarters, the Xuanqi armor directly attacked Jiuyanghai's magic circle.

Thundered!!!!

Under the attack after attack, Jiuyang Hai's magic circle collapsed little by little.

Compared to Xuanqi Pavilion, Jiuyang Sea has not given birth to Heavenly Ancestors, so there are no hole cards, and the magic circle is only built by the Jiuyang Great Ancestor in the fifth stage, which is not as good as the magic circle of Xuanqi Pavilion.

However, not long after the attack, Genki Pavilion gave up directly.

"Go to Xuanwu Mountain!"

Xuanwu Great Ancestor took the Xuanqi armor to Xuanwu Mountain.

However, the Jiuyang Sea Ancestors of Xuanwu Mountain had already received the news and left, leaving only the empty Xuanwu Mountain Treasure Land.

So far.

Xuanwu Mountain returned to the hands of Xuanqi Pavilion again.

Soon after, the great ancestors of Xuanqi Pavilion continued to hunt down and kill the great ancestors of Jiuyang Sea, and many of them were killed one after another, and many treasures were also lost, making Jiuyang Sea suffer heavy losses.

But soon, Xuanqi Pavilion stopped.

Because Taichen Palace spoke.

"Stop!"

Just one sentence made Xuanqi Pavilion stop chasing and killing the great ancestors of Jiuyanghai and completely reconcile with Jiuyanghai, this is the deterrence of Taichen Palace.

Whether it is Jiuyang Sea or Xuanqi Pavilion, they are the top forces in the Xuanqi Territory, and if they continue to make trouble like this, the Xuanqi Territory will be in chaos.

The Xuanqi Territory is equivalent to the back garden of Taichen Palace, and it is okay to make a small fuss, but it can be like this for a long time, and Taichen Palace naturally has to take care of it.

And just like that, this farce ended.

And after this incident, many forces were afraid of Xuanqi Pavilion again, and they thought that the big pavilion master of Xuanqi Pavilion had fallen, and Xuanqi Pavilion had completely declined.

But now it seems that Xuanqi Pavilion is still very strong.

Moreover, no one knows whether the Xuanqi Pavilion has other more powerful hole cards, so it cannot easily offend the Xuanqi Pavilion.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

After Ye Tian came back, he had an idea in his heart.

He's going to copy the Genki Armor!

According to the ability setting of the copying talent, he can't copy the creatures that are higher than his own cultivation, but he can still copy all things.

The Genki armor is not a living being, but only an item, so the ability to copy all things can be used here.

"The resources copied from copying everything can't be used to assist in cultivation, but if you copy the Xuanqi armor, it can really be used in battle!"

So, Ye Tian began to try to copy the Xuanqi armor.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian urged the ability to copy the talent with all his strength, and used it to copy the Xuanqi armor.

However, the speed of replication this time is very slow, which shows how difficult it is for the Genki armor to copy.

And too much energy is consumed in the replication process, and Ye Tian has no time to absorb external energy, because he can't keep up with the energy consumption in time, the replication process will be interrupted, so that he can't really replicate successfully.

As a result, Ye Tian consumed a lot of resources to refine to replenish energy.

It took a long time to finally reproduce a Genki armor.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

This Xuanqi armor is exactly the same as the Xuanqi armor in the Xuanqi Pavilion, there is no difference.

However, this Xuanqi armor could not be urged.

"There is no Origin Golden Crystal!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

He also tried to copy the Origin Golden Crystal, but the substance of the Origin Golden Crystal seemed to be beyond the scope of the copying talent, so it could not be copied out of thin air.

In fact, even if it is copied, it cannot be used as an energy source.

After all, the ability to copy all things, and the items that are copied, can only be seen and understood, but there is no way to use them as real.

"I still have to find an Origin Golden Crystal before I can urge this Xuanqi Armor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But the Origin Golden Crystal is too rare, and he can't get it yet.

"I wonder if I can replace it with other resources?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he began to inquire about the information about the Origin Golden Crystal and the information of the Infinite Realm Armor to see if he could find a substitute for the Origin Golden Crystal from these materials.

It just so happened that during the years of the Xuanqi Territory, many forces were also inquiring about the news.

After all, everyone wants to get a Xuanqi armor, even the Infinite Realm armor, even if you can't get it, it's good to get more information.

As a result, the news about the Infinite Realm Armor and the Origin Golden Crystal gradually increased.

According to the intelligence, an Infinite Realm Armor requires three Origin Gold Crystals to be activated, while the Xuanqi Armor only needs one to be sufficient.

But there is still no one who knows what the substitute for the Origin Golden Crystal is, after all, those forces in the Xuanqi Territory have not even seen the Infinite Realm Armor, nor have they seen the Origin Golden Crystal, so they naturally know very little information.

However.

On this day, Ye Tian got useful information from the mouth of the Blood Ancestor.

"Blood Ancestor, are you saying that ruin gold can replace the origin gold crystal?"

Ye Tian looked at the Blood Ancestor and asked.

"Yes!"

The Blood Ancestor affirmed: "When I followed the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, I heard the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor say that the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior can only be activated by a mysterious substance, and the Origin Golden Crystal contains this substance, and the Ruin Gold also contains this substance. However, the ruin gold contained very little material, so it required a large amount of ruin gold to be able to stimulate the Infinite Realm armor. "

"I see!"

When Ye Tian learned about the situation, he wanted to look for the ruin gold.

According to the information provided by the Blood Ancestor, the ruin gold exists in the immeasurable ruins, and it is also difficult to find.

If it was easy to find, there would have been many fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms entering the Immeasurable Realm Ruins in search of ruins.

And among the ruins of the Infinite Realm, there is one creature that can easily find ruin gold, and that is the ruin snake!

However, the strength of any ruin snake was no less than that of the top-tier fourth-level high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and its speed was faster than that of many fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

In addition, the Immeasurable Realm Ruins are an area that cultivators are reluctant to step into, and it is very dangerous to enter there, even if it is a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, it is not without danger.

Even if you find the Ruin Snake and catch the Ruin Snake, you can't ask the Ruin Snake to help you find the Ruin Gold.

Therefore, it is very difficult to find the ruin gold, and no one will look for it.
